description: Convert IBM WS-BPEL 2.0 processes to Orkes Conductor workflow JSON automatically.

apiKey.title: API Key
apiKey.description: Your BPEL2Orkes API key. Sign in with GitHub at bpel2orkes.kshetra.studio for 50 free conversions.

tools.name: convert_bpel
tools.description: Convert a WS-BPEL 2.0 XML process definition to Orkes Conductor workflow JSON. Returns the main workflow, sub-workflows, compensation flows, and migration warnings.

tools.name: get_migration_tips
tools.description: Get migration tips and a complexity assessment for a BPEL process without running a full conversion. Returns a Mermaid flow diagram and summary of auto-converted vs manual tasks.

tools.name: validate_on_orkes
tools.description: Convert a BPEL process and register the resulting workflow directly on an Orkes Conductor instance using provided credentials.
